name: dead-reckoning
description: Dead Reckoning - Apollo Guidance Computer interpretive execution environment

scripts.build: npm run build -w @dead-reckoning/event-stream && npm run build -w @dead-reckoning/vm-core && npm run build -w @dead-reckoning/runtime && npm run build -w @dead-reckoning/visualizer
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test -w @dead-reckoning/event-stream && npm run test -w @dead-reckoning/vm-core && npm run test -w @dead-reckoning/runtime && npm run test -w @dead-reckoning/visualizer
